function p(p)return s[p-(633138-581462)]end for p,u in ipairs({{532541-532540,931948+-931212};{-405323-(-405324);769814-769437};{-781210+781588;-453932+454668}})do while u[-29225-(-29226)]<u[-510015-(-510017)]do W(i)end,function(s,p)local W=o(p)local w=function(w,h)return u(s,{w,h},p,W)end return w end,function(s,p)local W=o(p)local w=function(w,h,R,E,i)return u(s,{w,h;R;E;i},p,W)end return w end,function(s,p)local W=o(p)local w=function(...)return u(s,{...},p,W)end return w end,function(s,p)local W=o(p)local w=function(w,h,R,E,i,b)return u(s,{w,h,R;E,i,b},p,W)end return w
